name: Holcomb Creek Trail
description: A challenging but rewarding rock crawling trail in the Big Bear area.

name: Mojave Road (West/Central)
description: Explore the historic Mojave Road, great for beginners with 4WD.

name: Ocotillo Wells SVRA
description: Vast desert playground with sand dunes and trails for all skill levels.

name: Berdoo Canyon Trail
description: A scenic desert trail with unique rock formations.

name: Coxey Road
description: An easy desert road leading to historical sites within Anza-Borrego.

name: Rainbow Trail
description: A scenic trail with great views and moderate obstacles.

name: Gold Fever Trail
description: Follow the path of gold prospectors in this historic mountain trail.

name: Dumont Dunes
description: Famous for dune buggying and sand rail riding.

description: A moderate trail with rocky sections in Ocotillo Wells.

name: Cleghorn Ridge Trail
description: Scenic ridge trail with optional harder sections. Great introduction with stunning views.

name: John Bull Trail
description: Serious rock crawling with optional bypasses. Skids and lockers strongly recommended.

name: Odessa-Doran Loop
description: A popular loop trail in Johnson Valley.

name: Outer Limits Trail
description: Known for its extreme rock obstacles and challenges.

name: Jack North Trail
description: A moderate mountain trail with scenic views.

name: Big Johnson Trail
description: A moderate trail featuring rocky terrain.

name: Idyllwild Mountain Road
description: A scenic drive through the mountains to Idyllwild.

description: A moderate climb with expansive views of the San Jacinto Valley.

name: San Jacinto Ridge Trail
description: A strenuous trail along the San Jacinto ridge.

name: Arrowhead North Loop
description: A scenic loop trail around Lake Arrowhead.

name: RC3331 Rattlesnake Canyon
description: Severe rock gardens, ledges, and tight squeezes. Winch likely needed.

description: A moderate desert trail through a wash, often good after rain.

description: A popular desert trail known for its sandy sections.
